title: Maybe therere more people than that
display_title: Maybe therere more people than that
wikitext:
[]: Maybe there're more people than that             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Sun Jul 30, 2006 8:33 pm Have you ever thought about how few people know the existence and truth of Eva Units? Suddenly I have this thought of maybe there're not that few people who knows the truth. When you build an Eva Unit you take a dozen of years, you need to build it's structures, her flesh, her bones and her brain etc. You need to write programs and many other stuff so that a Unit can really go out and fight an Angel. Probably this grand artifact is from the cooperation of many people and organizations. You have China, Germany, the US and Japan building Eva Units. Well of course only the high ranking officers like Gendo knows thoroughly the intentions behind, but actually there're many people around us who know something secret, maybe something they shouldn't know. And you just can't pay them money to shut their mouths up right? There're so many of them. I wonder if Seele ever worried those people would leak the secrets and sell them to terrorists.

[]:             Quote Post by System Shocker » Sun Jul 30, 2006 10:30 pm I don't believe there are any people who wrote programs for Eva Units. ANd I don't think there are any terrorists who have control rooms for Evas.

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Mon Jul 31, 2006 7:40 am Good question. I've been thinking on this a lot too. Any group would find an EVA quite useful, though hard to maintain. And as I recall, NERV centre wasn't too well protected from humans, as Hyuga mentioned in EOE. Maybe Anno just forgot that, or thought that this might break the magic of the story. I really don't know.

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Mon Jul 31, 2006 8:59 am It's certainly possible that there are more people, but that doesn't mean that they can't keep a secret. Take my neighbors the NSA, for instance. They've been one of the biggest employers in the State of Maryland for decades, but the government didn't even acknowledge the agency's existence for many years after its creation. Even now, it's hard to know much about the details of their operations without working there in upper management.

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Mon Jul 31, 2006 9:01 am Well the NSA isn't as big as the Nerv Branches right?

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Mon Jul 31, 2006 12:33 pm tinmeigut wrote: Well the NSA isn't as big as the Nerv Branches right?

[]:             Quote Post by ZeroFive1 » Mon Jul 31, 2006 1:41 pm Remember what was said by Fuyutsuki in ep. 21? "It seems that it would be no trouble for them to erase me."
